name: Secure and Ethical AI Lab
tagline: Building AI that is safe and equitable for every language user.
mission: The Secure and Ethical AI Lab (SEAL) at CU Boulder investigates how AI systems fail — and for whom — and designs the socio-technical guardrails that let them serve every community, in every language, without compromising safety, fairness, or human agency.
department: College of Engineering and Applied Science
